productName: Honey Stixx - 1pk - Flavored Infused Preroll - Loud Lychee - Hybrid - 0.75g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Loud Lychee and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a smooth, sweet honey flavor, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
